title: Batch flag validation: every missing/invalid flag reported at once, with a runnable example
read_first: skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/command-registry.mjs:1024-1031 (DB3 comment — the channel contract to preserve)
action: Per cli-ergonomics D1 (decision 8ef2bae6) and plan.md ce-1. Twins byte-identical (templates + .bee/bin, lib + bee.mjs; hook source under hooks/ flows to .bee/bin/hooks via onboard --apply). (1) validate-args.mjs validate(): collect ALL problems — required loop and type loop no longer return at first hit; add enum support (propSchema.enum + value not in it -> reason naming the allowed values). Return: error {field,reason,command} = FIRST problem (test_bee_cli.mjs:325 pin 'required, missing' must stay green), plus problems:[{field,reason},...]. (2) bee.mjs main() validate-failure emission: message lists every problem plus 'Example: <entry.examples[0]>'. (3) hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs checkCliShape: render all problems joined when present; keep pinned substrings 'bee CLI-shape guard', entry name, 'field: <first>' intact (test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs green). (4) bee.mjs new helper requireFlags(flags, spec, example) — spec [{name, enum?}...]; collects every missing/invalid; throws ONE Error listing all + Example line (stderr channel via existing emitError — DB3 preserved, nothing moves to stdout). Convert exactly three handlers: backlog.add (type/severity/layer/title/note, severity enum P1|P2|P3 and type/layer enums as currently enforced ad hoc), state.scribing-run (feature/areas/next-action), state.gate (name/approved). Update test_lib.mjs legacy text pins for those verbs if any pin breaks — same channel, new combined text. (5) Tests red-first and SCOPED (run only the new/changed tests during the red phase; full verify once at the end): validate() problems[] completeness; zero-flag backlog add names all missing flags in one stderr message + contains 'Example:'; invalid severity message names P1, P2, P3. Then regen: onboard --apply, render_plugin, release_manifest --write, impact_registry --write.

truths: test_bee_cli.mjs:325 pin (error.field/reason first-problem shape) still green
one invocation reports every missing/invalid flag for the three converted verbs
every batch refusal carries a runnable Example line
no refusal moves from stderr to stdout (DB3)
hook message keeps its pinned substrings
regen complete: ledger parity, release manifest, impact registry green

verify: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check

trace.outcome: Batch flag validation: validate() collects every problem (required + enum, enum scoped to required fields to preserve DB3), bee.mjs main() and hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs render all problems + an Example line, and backlog.add/state.gate/state.scribing-run now use a new requireFlags() batch helper on the same STDERR channel.
